description_long: This is a single-story suburban house surrounded by a wooden privacy fence and a well-maintained grassy yard. The house features a light-colored exterior with horizontal siding, several rectangular windows, and a small covered front porch with steps and columns. The backyard includes a circular patio area with red chairs and a table, as well as a winding stone path and some landscaping with bushes and a tree. The roof is flat and simple, with no visible overhangs or complex architectural details. The interior layout is partially visible, showing multiple rooms with wooden doors and cabinetry, and an open-plan kitchen and dining area.
description: A single-story, light-sided suburban house with a fenced yard, flat roof, and a small front porch. The backyard features a patio, landscaping, and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a small porch, steps, and three front windows, plus a grassy yard and part of the fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open backyard with a circular patio, red chairs, and a winding path, as well as the side of the house and fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, the full patio area with seating, and a large section of the wooden fence enclosing the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional landscaping, and the house's side wall with windows and doors.
attribute_entryway_design: Small covered porch with steps, columns, and a single front door
